# fluttersdk_wind

> Tailwind CSS for Flutter. Utility-first styling framework with `className` syntax, 23-field theming via `WindThemeData`, responsive prefixes (`sm:` / `md:` / `lg:` / `xl:` / `2xl:`), dark mode (`dark:`), state prefixes (`hover:` / `focus:` / `disabled:` / `loading:` / `selected:`), platform prefixes (`ios:` / `android:` / `web:` / `mobile:`), 20 W-prefix widgets, server-driven UI via `WDynamic`, and three AI integration layers (hosted MCP server, Claude Code skill, Cursor rules). Stable since 1.0.

**Widgets (20 user-facing)**, see [doc/widgets/](https://fluttersdk.com/wind/widgets/index.md) for full reference.

*Layout & container*
- `WDiv` (`Widget`): Flutter `Container` replacement; consumes `className` for spacing, color, border, shadow, layout.
- `WText` (`Widget`): Text widget with `className`-driven font, color, alignment, decoration.
- `WSpacer` (`Widget`): Flex-aware spacer that obeys responsive prefixes.
- `WBreakpoint` (`Widget`): Declarative per-breakpoint widget tree switcher; escape hatch when prefixes are not enough.

*Interactive*
- `WButton` (`Widget`): Button with `hover:` / `focus:` / `active:` / `loading:` / `disabled:` state prefixes.
- `WAnchor` (`Widget`): Inline interactive wrapper; auto-wraps `WDiv` / `WButton` when hover/focus prefixes are detected.
- `WPopover` (`Widget`): Overlay container with alignment + trigger / content builders.

*Form*
- `WInput` (`Widget`): TextField with `className` styling + `InputType` (text, email, number, password, multiline, search).
- `WSelect` (`Widget`): Dropdown with optional search, multi-select, pagination.
- `WCheckbox` (`Widget`): Checkbox or switch with `className`.
- `WDatePicker` (`Widget`): Single-date and date-range picker.
- `WFormInput` (`FormField`): Form-bound `WInput` wrapper with validator.
- `WFormSelect` (`FormField`): Form-bound `WSelect` wrapper with validator.
- `WFormMultiSelect` (`FormField`): Multi-select variant of `WFormSelect`.
- `WFormCheckbox` (`FormField`): Form-bound `WCheckbox` wrapper.
- `WFormDatePicker` (`FormField`): Form-bound `WDatePicker` wrapper.

*Media*
- `WIcon` (`Widget`): `IconData` with `className` size and color.
- `WImage` (`Widget`): Image with `className`-driven sizing, object-fit, border, opacity.
- `WSvg` (`Widget`): SVG via `flutter_svg` with `className` fill / stroke + `preserve-colors` opt-in.

*Dynamic*
- `WDynamic` (`Widget`): JSON-to-widget renderer for server-driven UI; whitelisted 13 Wind widgets + 16 Flutter core widgets.

**Parsers (17)**, first-match-wins; emit immutable `WindStyle` value object.

*Visual*
- background (color, gradient, image), border, ring, shadow, opacity

*Layout*
- padding, margin, sizing, flexbox + grid, position (relative + absolute + insets), order, overflow, aspect-ratio, z-index

*Typography*
- text (font-size, weight, family, tracking, leading, decoration, transform, align, overflow)

*Motion*
- animation, transition (duration + easing)

*Other*
- svg (fill, stroke, preserve-colors), debug

**Theme tokens (`WindThemeData` exposes 23 configurable fields):** `brightness`, `colors`, `screens`, `containers`, `fontSizes`, `fontWeights`, `tracking`, `leading`, `borderWidths`, `borderRadius`, `fontFamilies`, `ringWidths`, `ringOffsets`, `applyDefaultFontFamily`, `syncWithSystem`, `baseSpacingUnit`, `ringColor`, `opacities`, `zIndices`, `shadows`, `transitionDurations`, `transitionCurves`, `animations`.

**Prefix stack** in className: `<state>:<breakpoint>:<dark>:<platform>:<utility>`.
- States: `hover:`, `focus:`, `disabled:`, `loading:`, `selected:`, plus any custom state passed via `states: Set<String>?`.
- Breakpoints: `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:`, `xl:`, `2xl:`, plus custom via theme `screens`.
- Dark mode: `dark:`. Every color token (`bg-` / `text-` / `border-` / `fill-` / `ring-`) carries a `dark:` pair in the same className.
- Platforms: `ios:`, `android:`, `web:`, `mobile:`.

**Parser cache key**: `className + activeBreakpoint + brightness + platform + sorted(activeStates)`. Stable across rebuilds; invalidate via `WindParser.clearCache()` (test setUp only â€” never in production).

**Setup**:

1. `flutter pub add fluttersdk_wind`
2. Wrap app: `WindTheme(data: WindThemeData(), builder: (ctx, controller) => MaterialApp(theme: controller.toThemeData(), home: HomePage()))`.
3. Build with className: `WDiv(className: 'p-6 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-xl shadow-lg', child: WText('Hello', className: 'text-xl font-bold dark:text-white'))`.
4. (Debug only) `if (kDebugMode) Wind.installDebugResolver();` exposes 6-field debug data to inspectors via `fluttersdk_wind_diagnostics_contracts`.
